goal: Make the HQ game view mobile friendly

risks: Touch handler conflicts: single-finger drag vs scroll, pinch-to-zoom vs browser native zoom
Bottom sheet UX on small screens: safe areas, drag thresholds, iPhone SE (375px)
Camera fitToView assumptions: doesn't account for bottom sheet overlay or virtual keyboard
challenges.recommendation: Proceed as-is — code is already written, needs thorough review

initiatives.title: Review mobile-friendly HQ game implementation
initiatives.user_scenario: The CEO opens the HQ game on their phone, pans the office with a finger, pinch-zooms to inspect a desk, and taps an employee to see their status in a bottom sheet.
initiatives.scope: Review all mobile game changes across 5 files: GamePage.tsx, CanvasOffice.tsx, camera.ts, GameHeader.tsx, SidePanel.tsx.
definition_of_done: Touch handlers properly distinguish single-finger drag from tap and from pinch-to-zoom
Camera fitToView correctly calculates zoom for mobile viewport sizes
No hardcoded widths that break below 375px
Bottom sheet SidePanel handles iOS safe areas
GameHeader compact mode hides non-essential elements without layout shifts
